name: {{PACKET_NAME}}
outcome_goal: Author a structured code-change candidate for bugs {{BUG_IDS_COMMA}}. No live source write is allowed from this workflow.
anti_requirements: Do NOT edit live source or packet markdown.
Do NOT use any direct code-change submit interface.
Do NOT resolve FIXED without a materialized candidate and validates_fix evidence.
Do NOT widen scope outside the listed bugs and authority owner.

jobs.label: author_code_change_candidate
jobs.description: Author a DB-resident code-change candidate; do not mutate source.
jobs.outcome_goal: A sealed workflow submission plus code_change_candidate_payload row exists for the primary bug in scope.
